LAW AND MOTION 301, DEFENDANT CHICAGO TITLE INSURANCE COMPANY'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT FOR NEGLIGENCE IS OVERRULED WITH 10 DAYS TO ANSWER; THE COURT CANNOT DETERMINE AS A MATTER OF LAW BASED ON THE PLEADINGS THAT DEFENDANT OWED NO TORT DUTY TO PLAINTIFF. Off Calendar Sep-23-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS:
DEFENDANT CHICAGO TITLE INSURANCE COMPANY'S Demurrer To Complaint For Negligence IS OVERRULED WITH 10 DAYS TO ANSWER; THE COURT CANNOT DETERMINE AS A MATTER OF LAW BASED ON THE PLEADINGS THAT DEFENDANT OWED NO TORT DUTY TO PLAINTIFF. Opposing party is to submit a proposed form of order. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR # 8189 =301/PJB
